location: Rare (4% at 100 Discovery) drop from Greataxe-wielding Giant Skeletons. A reliable base-game farm spot: the notably taller skeleton among a small graveyard due east of the South Raya Lucaria Gate grace, next to a lone tree and a collapsed tower.
tactics: From South Raya Lucaria Gate grace, head due east to a tree and tombstones; approaching wakes several Evil Skeletons from the ground
Only the clearly taller skeleton carries the Executioner's Greataxe — the smaller ones don't drop it
These skeletons are weak to Strike and Holy damage, which speeds the farm up a lot
Similar skeleton farm spots exist west of Church of Irith and east of Church of Plague in Caelid if you'd rather farm there instead
lore: A massive cleaver bolted to a long pole, once carried by executioners to finish off already-beaten soldiers on the battlefield — a grim history reflected in how brutally it capitalizes on critical hits.

builds.name: Pure Strength crit-fisher
builds.why: C-rank Strength scaling plus a boosted critical damage multiplier make it a strong two-handed Strength pick.

builds.name: War Cry brawler
builds.why: War Cry buffs attack rating for trading blows with tanky enemies and bosses.
